title: Go rewrite branch for Bubble Tea v2 host
description: Create a dedicated rewrite branch from tui-work to evaluate a real Bubble Tea v2 rewrite path for ion, using a minimal-but-real vertical slice rather than a toy spike.

logs.msg: Created branch codex/go-rewrite-host from tui-work and scaffolded go-host/ as a real Bubble Tea v2 rewrite attempt. Added a first vertical slice with transcript viewport, multiline textarea composer, footer/status, inline-mode run path, and fake async assistant turns. Early finding: Charm v2 module paths are mixed (bubbletea/bubbles on charm.land paths in v2), but the module setup is workable.

Rebased codex/go-rewrite-host onto tui-work after committing the carried-over Rust TUI cleanup batch (3652acc) on tui-work. Branch stack is now clean: tui-work contains the Rust-side cleanup, and the Go rewrite branch sits on top of it.
